# Green Planet Gardening — Full Information

> M.K. Green Planet Gardening and Landscaping Ltd is a family-run luxury landscaping company based in Paphos, Cyprus. Founded by three brothers — Charalambos, Marios, and Angelos Knodaritis — the company has over 10 years of experience creating bespoke gardens for private villas, resorts, and high-end residences across Cyprus.

## Company Overview

Green Planet Gardening is a registered Cyprus company (HE402756) specialising in luxury garden design, construction, and maintenance. The company operates with a boutique approach, taking on a limited number of projects each year to ensure maximum quality and personal attention.

The company's philosophy centres on four core values: Passion, Precision, Trust, and Timeless design. Every project begins with listening to the client, grows through expert craftsmanship, and results in a garden that balances art, nature, and emotion.

Green Planet Gardening collaborates with architects, builders, interior designers, and property developers to create tailor-made green spaces where every plant, stone, and light finds its perfect place.

## Team

### Charalambos Knodaritis — Green Director & Landscape Architect
Leads all design and planning. Trained in horticulture and landscape architecture, he transforms client visions into living art through sustainable Mediterranean design.

### Marios Knodaritis — Operations Manager & Garden Specialist
Manages daily operations and garden maintenance programs. His deep knowledge of Mediterranean plants ensures every garden thrives in Cyprus's climate.

### Angelos Knodaritis — Garden Construction & Irrigation Specialist
Executes hardscaping, pathways, walls, water features, and irrigation systems with precision and durable materials.

### Fabio Fornaro — Strategic Business Consultant & Project Advisor
Brings 25 years of business development and strategic consulting experience. Supports the Knodaritis brothers as a guide for turning vision into structured strategy.

## Services

### 1. Luxury Garden Design & Construction
Complete bespoke garden creation from concept to completion. Includes:
- Initial consultation and site analysis
- Custom landscape design with 3D visualisation
- Mediterranean and drought-resistant plant selection
- Hardscaping: natural stone pathways, terraces, retaining walls
- Softscaping: planting, lawn installation, tree placement
- Outdoor lighting design and installation
- Irrigation system design and installation
- Water features and swimming pool landscaping

### 2. Professional Maintenance & Green Management
Ongoing care programs to keep gardens in perfect condition. Includes:
- Scheduled lawn care (mowing, aeration, fertilisation)
- Pruning and hedge trimming
- Seasonal planting rotations
- Pest and disease management
- Irrigation system monitoring and adjustment
- Fertilisation programs tailored to Cyprus soil conditions

### 3. Tailored Consulting for Architects & Investors
Expert landscape consulting for professionals. Includes:
- Garden feasibility studies for new developments
- Plant palette recommendations for Cyprus climate zones
- Landscape budgeting and project planning
- Sustainable and water-efficient garden strategies
- Integration of outdoor living spaces with architectural design

## Service Area

Green Planet Gardening serves all regions of Cyprus:
- Paphos (headquarters and primary service area)
- Limassol
- Nicosia
- Larnaca
- Ayia Napa and Protaras
- Mountain and rural properties

## Expertise

- Mediterranean landscaping optimised for hot, dry Cyprus summers and mild winters
- Drought-resistant and water-wise garden design using native and adapted plant species
- Luxury outdoor living spaces for high-end villas and resort properties
- Natural stone work and traditional Mediterranean hardscaping techniques
- Smart irrigation systems that minimise water usage
- Sustainable landscaping practices

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What areas of Cyprus does Green Planet Gardening serve?
Green Planet Gardening is based in Paphos and serves all regions of Cyprus, including Limassol, Nicosia, Larnaca, and coastal resort areas.

### How much does luxury landscaping cost in Cyprus?
Project costs vary based on garden size, design complexity, and materials. Green Planet Gardening provides detailed quotations after an initial consultation and site visit. A 30% deposit is required to begin work.

### What plants grow best in Cyprus gardens?
Mediterranean and drought-resistant species thrive in Cyprus, including olive trees, bougainvillea, lavender, rosemary, citrus trees, and native Cyprus flora. Green Planet Gardening specialises in selecting plants that flourish in the local climate with minimal water requirements.

### Does Green Planet Gardening offer garden maintenance?
Yes. The company provides ongoing professional maintenance programs including lawn care, pruning, irrigation management, fertilisation, and seasonal planting.

### How long does a garden design project take?
Timelines depend on project scope. A typical luxury garden project takes 4–12 weeks from design approval to completion. Green Planet Gardening provides a detailed timeline during the quotation phase.

### Is Green Planet Gardening insured?
Yes. The company carries professional liability insurance and provides a 12-month warranty on hardscaping work and a 3-month warranty on plants.

- Registration Number: HE402756 (Cyprus Registrar of Companies)
- Director: Marios Knodaritis
- Governing Law: Republic of Cyprus
- Jurisdiction: Paphos District Courts
